item.title: A lesson on why we need Democrats who will hold corporations accountable, because the Republicans sure as shit aren't going to do it
item.description: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/RadiumGirls https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/UnitedStatesRadiumCorporation https://law.justia.com/cases/federal/district-courts/FSupp/13/263/2096834/ https://www.npr.org/2014/12/28/373510029/saved-by-a-bad-taste-one-of-the-last-radium-girls-dies-at-107 Interesting note: the judge that presided over the lawsuit turned out to be a shareholder of USRC

item.title: Change my mind
item.description: What’s a good reason to vote red? You just think elephants are a cooler animal?
item.dc:creator: dmpeeper

item.title: The best news
item.description:
They really do be thinking that they're winning some psychological battle with this shit
Instead they helped a little black boy :)
Edit: His mother even wrote a book! (Previously said he wrote it on accident- sorry!) Yeah, keep up the 'good fight', Republicans lol. Edit #2: It is absolutely wild that (so far) 20 people have disliked this post. 20 people- and I'm sure that includes a few run of the mill trolls too- were somehow upset by a sweet little boy experiencing a brief reprieve in life. Wowie.

item.title: Happy dog meme dump where I pulled out the classics
item.description: I'm trying to help my friend pull his little lady out of some serious kidney issues stemming from a poisoning she went through a couple years ago. The fight has been long and hard but we still hope they can get out of them in the end. If you can help them out, please do! https://gofund.me/d8e3dd17
item.dc:creator: thedeadredhead

item.title: He's my dream Presidential candidate. NGL.
item.description: Guys, I like Biden and I don't think he's doing horrible, but I've gotta be honest - if Jon Stewart ran for President, I'd vote for him in a heartbeat. ***** Unpopular Opinion That I'm Sharing For Some Reason: I wish Biden would be content with serving one term. The Presidency has noticeably aged him (as it does with every President), and he was old AF to begin with. He is going to struggle HARD in a Presidential campaign, and I'm not sure he can win. I feel like we need a stronger candidate - Jon Stewart, notwithstanding. (That's just my strategic point of view. Don't come at me.) Obviously I'll vote for Biden again if I have to - it's just gonna cause me considerably more stress, if that's the case.
item.dc:creator: ButtersTheCat

item.title: “Stop treating US like thugs! It’s disgusting!”
item.dc:creator: dmpeeper

item.title: STEM dump
item.description:
This dump may be too niche at points but hopefully it makes y’all laugh
I laughed at this one for way too long
Tbh most times I failed an exam in college was due to multiplication errors
I work in HVAC and we need turbulent flow through heat exchangers for proper heat transfer
Thankfully I dont do this but it is me internally
I never used this assumption but it cracks me up how mad it makes physicists
No way would I have finished engineering school before the internet
All because of those dang ice blocks
Excel does most of my math these days
My file names always end up like this. “Please calculate” “what am I doing wrong” “this is this last one idc”
Concentrated in thermo and fluids in college and still took me until 3 years post grad to get it
A chicken is a metal
Or magnets. It’s a miracle
I wish I could show this to my electrical teacher
Orbs
I worked with a program written in Fortran for years. So outdated
A tragedy that def makes you remember pressure vessel design
Lmao I was a test engineer for a couple years and YUP
Cat tax! This is Toaster. She is a menace but I would die for her

item.title: Mini-dump: United States of despair w/sprinkles of hahas and mental health solidarity bc I crave that green light
item.description:
Whoops random camera pic...roses in their brief bloom window where I live
The social landscape of this country would be terrifying and infuriating even if I weren't neurodivergent and anxious af most days.
Fluffy butt puppy doggalah tax. Maddie wuvs you.

item.title: It's my cake day, have a few of my favourite travel/scenery pics to enjoy.....
item.description:
Sorvagsvatn, the lake over the ocean originally posted by @iamyourgrandmaandtotallynotawolf
Seymour, Connecticut, originally posted by @jjlew080
Tour Percée, Chartreuse, Grenoble, originally posted by @DailyzFun
Wisteria Flower Tunnel, Japan originally posted by @bluejaymaplesyrup
Palmer Park, Colorado Springs, originally posted by @AngerMike
The Milky Way over Stonehaven War Memorial, Scotland, originally posted by @WeAreGroot
Marble Caves of Patagonia, Chile. originally posted by @Breakfastantelope
Some more Scottish scenery, cause we can't have enough of my home country, courtesy of @ZombiesAndZoos
Another from @ZombiesAndZoos
Dragonblood trees, Yemen, from @RedKoi
Obligatory unsolicited dick pic.
item.dc:creator: DMorison

item.dc:creator: TheEndOfEvangelion

item.title: I’m breaking my own heart
item.description: She’s a single mom with a son. I’m a single dad with a son. When our kids go on play dates, we talk and talk and talk.. I started having feelings for her about two months ago. I ask her questions about herself, I remember the small details, I listen with my heart and my ears. She doesn’t really ask me about myself but she does listen when I talk about myself. I’d like to ask her out but I doubt she feels anything that isn’t platonic for me.
item.dc:creator: PMMELEMMINGS

item.title: May 2019, The Neutral Zone had the honour of hosting Nichelle Nicholls in Miami and an unexpected guest turned up
item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: Elephant Ear Plant
item.description: Elephant Ear Plant. Alocasia, elephant ear or African mask plant is a big-leafed tropical that's usually grown as an outdoor summer plant. However, it'll also work as a potted plant that you can grow inside or use as a houseplant. The elephant ear plant provides a bold tropical effect in nearly any landscape setting. In fact, these plants are commonly grown for their large, tropical-looking foliage, which is reminiscent of elephant ears. Elephant ear plants can be used as background plants, ground covers, or edging, especially around ponds or along walkways or patio enclosures. https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Colocasia
